transcript.content: Hi, I'd like to book a physiotherapy appointment for tomorrow afternoon please.

Namaste, thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy! I'm Asha, the clinic's AI assistant — calls may be recorded. May I know which branch you prefer: Bannerghatta Road (Medax) or Wilson Garden (Arc)? If you tell me where you live or work, I can suggest the closer branch.
Namaste Asha! I’m in the Bannerghatta area, so the Bannerghatta Road branch would be better for me.

One moment, let me check tomorrow afternoon slots for Bannerghatta Road branch. Thank you! Tomorrow afternoon at our Bannerghatta Road branch, I have two options: twelve noon with Dr. Gopika Nair, or four o’clock with Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi. Which one would you prefer?
I’ll take the twelve noon slot with Dr. Gopika Nair, please.
Great, I’ll book the Monday, twelve noon slot at our Bannerghatta Road branch with Dr. Gopika Nair. May I have your full name, first and last, for the appointment?
Sure, it’s Vikram Malhotra.
Thank you. I have written your name as Vikram Malhotra — is that correct?
Yes, that's correct. Thank you!

Booking your appointment, one moment please. Your appointment is confirmed: Vikram Malhotra, Monday, twenty July, twelve noon at our Bannerghatta Road branch with Dr. Gopika Nair. The consultation fee is four hundred rupees.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's all for now. Thank you so much!
You’re most welcome! Wishing you a speedy recovery. Have a great day! Goodbye.

transcript.content: नमस्ते, मुझे कल सुबह के लिए appointment बुक करनी है।

नमस्ते, thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy! I'm Asha, the clinic's AI assistant — calls may be recorded. 

कल यानी Monday है। आपको कौन सा branch convenient रहेगा — Bannerghatta Road (Medax) या Wilson Garden (Arc)?
मुझे Wilson Garden (Arc) branch पर appointment चाहिए।
एक moment, मैं slots देखती हूँ। Wilson Garden branch पर कल सुबह दो slots available हैं — दस तीस बजे Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi के साथ या ग्यारह बजे Dr. Anamika Lyngdoh के साथ। कौन सा slot बुक करूँ?
दस तीस बजे Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi के साथ बुक कर दीजिए।
ठीक है, अब आपकी पूरी नाम बता दीजिए — first और last name दोनों, ताकि मैं appointment बुक कर सकूँ।

एक moment, मैं आपकी booking कर रही हूँ। आपकी appointment confirm हो गई है — Monday, बीस जुलाई, सुबह दस तीस बजे, Wilson Garden branch में Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi के साथ। फीस चार सौ रुपये है।

और कुछ मदद कर सकती हूँ?
नहीं, धन्यवाद! बस यही जानकारी चाहिए थी।
धन्यवाद, सुनीता जी! आपको appointment के लिए शुभकामनाएँ। कोई और मदद चाहिए हो तो कभी भी कॉल कीजिए। नमस्ते!

transcript.content: Hello, mujhe appointment chahiye — koi bhi Thursday morning chalega mere liye.

One moment, let me check Thursday morning slots for you. Yes, Thursday morning slots are available. You can book:

- Nine thirty in the morning with Dr. Gopika Nair at our Bannerghatta Road branch,
- Nine thirty with Dr. Dilpreet Kaur at Bannerghatta Road,
- Or ten thirty with Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi at our Wilson Garden branch.

Which one would you like?
Mujhe Dr. Gopika Nair ke saath nine thirty ka slot chahiye, please.
ठीक है, Dr. Gopika Nair के साथ Thursday, 23 July सुबह नौ तीस बजे, Bannerghatta Road branch पर slot hold कर रही हूँ। आपकी पूरी नाम क्या है?
Mera naam Rohit Kulkarni hai.
मैंने आपका नाम Rohit Kulkarni लिखा है — सही है?
Haan, bilkul sahi hai.

एक पल रुकिए, मैं आपकी booking कर रही हूँ। आपकी appointment confirm हो गई है: Rohit Kulkarni, Thursday, 23 July सुबह नौ तीस बजे, Bannerghatta Road branch पर Dr. Gopika Nair के साथ। Consultation fee four hundred rupees है।

और कोई मदद चाहिए?
Nahi, bas itna hi. Thank you!
Thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy, Rohit! Wish you a speedy recovery. Goodbye!

transcript.content: I want to make sure — book me an appointment for my session, the same one I had asked for.

Hi Kavita, I’m Asha, the clinic’s AI assistant — calls may be recorded. Just to clarify, you already have an appointment booked for your Initial Physiotherapy Assessment with Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi at our Wilson Garden branch on Thursday, twenty-third July at twelve noon.

Would you like to book another session in addition to this, or are you asking to confirm or change your existing appointment? Please let me know how you’d like to proceed.
Oh, I just want to be sure, can you book me again for the same time, please?

For privacy, I’ll need to verify your identity before discussing or changing any existing appointments. I’ll send a six-digit code to your registered number ending in nine zero six. One moment please. I’ve sent a six-digit code to your mobile. Please type the code on your phone keypad, or you can say it out loud.
Sure, the code is 123456.
One moment please. That code didn’t match. Could you please check the SMS on your phone and try again?
Oh, let me check... Okay, the code is 654321.
One moment please. Sorry, that code is still not correct. Please check your SMS again and enter the exact six-digit code you received. You have one more attempt.
Oh no, okay, let me look again... The code is 789012.

One moment please. Sorry, that was the last attempt. I’m unable to verify your identity right now. I’ll ask a staff member to call you back and help with your appointment. Is there anything else you’d like me to mention to them?
No, that's fine. Just let them know I want to confirm my appointment. Thank you!
Let me note that down. A staff member will call you back soon to help confirm your appointment. Thank you for your patience, Kavita. Have a good day!

transcript.content: Hello, I'd like to book an appointment this week.

Oh, it's for me, Priya Verma.
Thank you, Priya. Which branch would you prefer for your appointment — Bannerghatta Road (Medax) or Wilson Garden (Arc)? If you tell me where you live or work, I can suggest the closer branch.
I live near Bannerghatta Road, so that branch would be better for me.
Got it, Priya. Which day and time this week would work best for you at our Bannerghatta Road branch? We’re open Monday to Saturday, nine in the morning to six thirty in the evening.
I’m flexible, so any day and time this week works for me.

One moment, let me check the schedule for you. Priya, I have two options at our Bannerghatta Road branch: Monday, twentieth July at nine thirty in the morning with Dr. Dilpreet Kaur, or ten fifteen with Dr. Gopika Nair. Would you like to book one of these?
I’ll take the appointment with Dr. Dilpreet Kaur at nine thirty, please.
Great, Priya. So that's Monday, twentieth July at nine thirty in the morning with Dr. Dilpreet Kaur at our Bannerghatta Road branch. Shall I go ahead and book this for you?
Yes, please go ahead and book it.

Booking your slot now. Your appointment is confirmed for Monday, twentieth July at nine thirty in the morning with Dr. Dilpreet Kaur at our Bannerghatta Road branch. The consultation fee is four hundred rupees.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that’s all. Thank you!
You’re welcome, Priya! Wishing you a speedy recovery. Have a great day! Goodbye.

एक मिनट, मैं देखती हूँ। मैं note कर रही हूँ, एक मिनट। हमारी staff आपको इसी number पर जल्दी call करेगी — वो आपकी medical query में मदद करेंगी। क्या और कुछ पूछना है?

माफ़ कीजिए, अभी मैं सीधे किसी human से call connect नहीं कर सकती। हमारी staff आपको जल्दी call करेगी और आपकी help करेगी। अगर numbness बढ़ रहा है या कोई और परेशानी हो रही है, तो please तुरंत नज़दीकी hospital या doctor से मिलें। 

क्या मैं आपकी physiotherapy appointment भी book करूँ?
Thik hai, lekin mujhe call ka promise chahiye. Aap mujhe confirm kar do ki koi call karega. Phir main appointment ke liye sochta hoon.

जी, मैं confirm करती हूँ — हमारी staff आपको इसी number पर ज़रूर call करेगी। आपकी request मैंने note कर ली है, और जल्दी ही कोई human आपसे संपर्क करेगा।

अब अगर आप चाहें तो appointment के बारे में भी बात कर सकते हैं।
Okay, call ka promise mil gaya hai, toh main appointment ke liye soch sakta hoon. Kya kal afternoon mein koi slot hai?

एक मिनट, मैं कल afternoon के slots देखती हूँ। कल afternoon में दो branches पर slots available हैं — Wilson Garden branch पर दोपहर बारह बजे Dr. Anamika के साथ, या Bannerghatta Road branch पर बारह पैंतालीस पर Dr. Gopika के साथ। कौन सा slot आपके लिए ठीक रहेगा?
Mujhe Wilson Garden branch ka slot chahiye, Dr. Anamika ke saath. Kya aap book kar sakti ho?
ठीक है, Wilson Garden branch पर कल दोपहर बारह बजे Dr. Anamika के साथ slot hold कर रही हूँ। आपकी booking के लिए आपका पूरा नाम बता दीजिए — first और last name दोनों।
Mera naam Sameer Shaikh hai. Thank you!

एक मिनट, मैं booking कर रही हूँ। आपकी appointment confirm हो गई है — Sameer Shaikh, Monday बीस जुलाई, दोपहर बारह बजे, Wilson Garden branch, Dr. Anamika के साथ। Consultation fee चार सौ रुपये है।

क्या और कुछ मदद कर सकती हूँ?
Nahi, bas itna hi. Aapka shukriya! Mujhe call ka intezaar rahega.
बहुत धन्यवाद, Sameer ji! हमारी staff आपको जल्दी call करेगी। आपकी appointment details भी confirm हैं। शुभकामनाएँ — जल्दी स्वस्थ हों!

transcript.content: Hi, this is Aditya Iyer — I want to book a physiotherapy session for tomorrow evening, around five or six.

Namaste, thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy! I'm Asha, the clinic's AI assistant — calls may be recorded. 

Aditya, which branch would you prefer for your appointment tomorrow evening — Bannerghatta Road (Medax) or Wilson Garden (Arc)?
Uh, I didn't realize I was talking to a robot. Anyway, let's go with the Bannerghatta Road branch.

One moment, let me check the Bannerghatta Road evening slots for tomorrow. Thank you for confirming the branch. For tomorrow evening at our Bannerghatta Road branch, I have two options at five o’clock — one with Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi, and one with Dr. Gopika Nair. Would you like to book either of these?
Wait, you just asked me the branch again! Anyway, I'll take the slot with Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi at five o'clock.
Got it, Aditya. Before I book, can you please confirm your full name as “Aditya Iyer”? Is that correct?
Yes, that's correct! But you already have my name. Can we just move on?

Booking your slot now, one moment please. Your appointment is confirmed, Aditya Iyer — Monday, twentieth July at five o’clock in the evening, Bannerghatta Road branch, with Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi. The consultation fee is four hundred rupees.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's all. Thanks for the help!
You’re welcome, Aditya! Wishing you a speedy recovery. Have a great day! Goodbye.

transcript.content: Hi, I'd like to book an appointment for next week please.

Namaste, thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy! I'm Asha, the clinic's AI assistant — calls may be recorded. Which branch would you prefer for your appointment: Bannerghatta Road (Medax) or Wilson Garden (Arc)?
Namaste Asha! Any branch is fine for me.
Thank you! Which day next week would you prefer for your appointment, or should I check the earliest available slot for you?
I can take any day next week, so the earliest slot works for me.

One moment, let me check the earliest available slot for next week. The earliest available slot next week is Monday, twentieth July at ten fifteen in the morning, with Dr. Dilpreet Kaur at our Bannerghatta Road branch. Shall I book this for you?
Yes, please book that for me.
Great! May I have your full name, first and last, to complete the booking?
Three Watch Toshniwal.
Sorry, I didn’t catch that name clearly. Could you please repeat your full name, or spell it out for me?
Oh, I’m sorry! It’s Shrivatsa Toshniwal.
Thank you! I have your name as Shrivatsa Toshniwal — is that correct?
Yes, that's correct.

One moment, booking your appointment. Your appointment is confirmed for Monday, twentieth July at ten fifteen in the morning with Dr. Dilpreet Kaur at our Bannerghatta Road branch. The consultation fee is four hundred rupees.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's all. Thank you!
You’re welcome! Wishing you a speedy recovery. Have a great day! Goodbye!

Hello Rohan, I’m Asha, the clinic’s AI assistant — calls may be recorded. For your privacy, I’ll send a six-digit code to your registered number. One moment please. I’ve sent the code by SMS. Please type the six-digit code on your phone keypad, or you can say it out loud.
Okay, let me check. The code is one one one one one one.
One moment please. That code isn’t correct. Could you please re-check the SMS and try again?
Oh, let me try again. It’s two two two two two two.
One moment please. Sorry, that code is still not correct. Please check the SMS again and enter the code once more.
I’m really sorry, but I can’t find the right SMS. Can you please have someone call me back?

No problem, Rohan. I’ll have someone from the clinic call you back to help with your appointment. One moment while I note this down. A staff member will call you back soon on this number to help with your appointment. Is there anything else I can assist you with right now?

latency.caveat: Latency values are Retell-measured per-call percentiles aggregated across calls. Retell's e2e EXCLUDES the caller-side network leg: callers dialing from India over the US number (or WebRTC from India) experience roughly +250-350ms on top of these figures. ASR component latency is not separately exposed by the platform; it is included in e2e.
